jd_text: Job Description About our client Our client is a prominent and well-established family office with a global outlook. They are seeking to appoint a senior investment professional to lead their portfolio strategy across private equity funds and listed equities. The position is based in Dubai. What The Job Involves This is a senior-level opportunity to shape and oversee investment activity across a significant portfolio Take ownership of sourcing, evaluating, and selecting private equity and public market fund opportunities globally – with a focus on Europe, North America, and Asia Present well-reasoned investment cases and recommendations to the investment committee Work closely with the Chairman and CFO to refine asset allocation and ensure consistent out-performance against the benchmark Help steer investment strategy and portfolio construction with long-term capital preservation and growth in mind Who we are looking for Extensive experience in selecting and investing into private equity funds Experience of investing into private equity funds based in the USA is strongly preferred A well-developed network of GP relationships across key global markets A hands-on, delivery-focused professional with sound commercial judgement and a collaborative approach Advanced financial analysis and valuation skills Excellent communication ability – both in crafting clear investment recommendations and engaging senior stakeholders with conviction Experience of reviewing, updating and implementing investment strategies Job Details Role Level: Executive-Level Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: https://www.PER-people.com Job Function: Finance Company Industry/ Sector: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals What We Offer About The Company Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life. The TALENTMATE Portal idea is to fill and help professionals doing one of them by bringing together the requisites under One Roof. Whether you're hunting for your Next Job Opportunity or Looking for Potential Employers, we're here to lend you a Helping Hand. Report Disclaimer: talentmate.com is only a platform to bring jobseekers & employers together. Applicants are advised to research the bonafides of the prospective employer independently. We do NOT endorse any requests for money payments and strictly advice against sharing personal or bank related information. We also recommend you visit Security Advice for more information. If you suspect any fraud or malpractice, email us at abuse@talentmate.com.
